meaning: n.宸ㄥぇ閮藉競,浜哄彛绋犲瘑鍦板甫
examples: This 'megalopolis' was reported to be composed of 360 million workers and a million queens living in 4,500 interconnected nests across a territory of 2.7 square kilometres.
How, then, can important parcels reach their destinations in a squalid megalopolis of the future?
The city continues to multiply demographically: some 10 million people now live in the center or in the suburbs of this megalopolis.
Angelenos tend to be intensely loyal to their own neighbourhoods but indifferent to the surrounding megalopolis.
In this steamy, frantic, uglybeautiful, often malodorous megalopolis, the people know how to live.
